value.stringValue:
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"8%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c/100*8*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"8.1%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c/100*8.1*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"9%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c/100*9*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"2.6%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c/100*2.6*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"7.7%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c/100*7.7*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"2.5%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c/100*2.5*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"19%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c/100*19*20,0)/20,
0)))))))

formulas.name: formula_2_myRule_1_A1_1045442350
formulas.expression:
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"8%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c}/100*8*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"8.1%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c}/100*8.1*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"9%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c}/100*9*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"2.6%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c}/100*2.6*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"7.7%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c}/100*7.7*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"2.5%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c}/100*2.5*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"19%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmountCHF__c}/100*19*20,0)/20,
0)))))))

value.stringValue:
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"8%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmount__c/100*8*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"8.1%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmount__c/100*8.1*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"9%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmount__c/100*9*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"7.7%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmount__c/100*7.7*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"2.5%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmount__c/100*2.5*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"2.6%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmount__c/100*2.6*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL([InvoicePos__c].InvoiceName__c.VATPercent__c ,"19%"), ROUND([InvoicePos__c].InvoicePositionAmount__c/100*19*20,0)/20,
0)))))))

formulas.name: formula_3_myRule_1_A1_7114584377
formulas.expression:
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"8%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmount__c}/100*8*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"8.1%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmount__c}/100*8.1*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"9%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmount__c}/100*9*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"7.7%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmount__c}/100*7.7*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"2.5%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmount__c}/100*2.5*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"2.6%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmount__c}/100*2.6*20,0)/20,
IF( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.InvoiceName__r.VATPercent__c} ,"19%"), ROUND({!myVariable_current.InvoicePositionAmount__c}/100*19*20,0)/20,
0)))))))
